description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the maven:3.6-jdk-8-alpine Docker image and define three stages: build, test, and deploy. Add a build job (stage build) that runs "mvn $MAVEN_CLI_OPTS package -DskipTests -DskipITs" and caches the .m2/repository and target directories with a key based on the job name and commit ref. Add a test job (stage test) that installs grep via "apk add grep", runs "mvn $MAVEN_CLI_OPTS verify -DskipITs", and after the script echoes test coverage by extracting the Total percentage from the Jacoco HTML report. Add a deploy job (stage deploy) that runs only on branches matching /^release/.*$/ or master and executes "mvn $MAVEN_CLI_OPTS deploy -s ci_settings.xml -Pdeploy -DskipTests -DskipITs". Add a manual deploy job that extends the deploy job, runs only on feature/, bugfix/, or hotfix/ branches, and in a before_script conditionally sets a SNAPSHOT version with "mvn $MAVEN_CLI_OPTS versions:set -DgenerateBackupPoms=false -DnewVersion=${CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG}-SNAPSHOT". Include the standard Code Quality, Dependency Scanning, License Management, and SAST templates.
